heading: Applicability of certain provisions of Bretton Woods Agreements Act
label: 290l–2 Applicability of certain provisions of Bretton Woods Agreements Act
text: shall apply to the Bank in the same manner in which such section applies to the International Bank for Reconstruction and Development and the International Monetary Fund.Section 286b of this title
notes: References in TextThe Bretton Woods Agreements Act, referred to in section catchline, is , , which is classified principally to subchapter XV (§ 286 et seq.) of this chapter.
